productDisplayName: Baggit Women Goofy Jhuti Pink Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 13 cm x 19 cm Crafted from jute with a leatherette flap Tri fold wallet with ten card holder slots, one id holder, three pockets and a zippered pocket on one side, a buttoned pocket and two pockets on the centre fold A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
